# A terminal that burns bright

> Generated by docmd

## Documentation Files

- [AI](https://nova.pmqueiroz.dev/ai/)
  Providers, configuration, and how Nova builds AI requests.
- [CLI](https://nova.pmqueiroz.dev/cli/)
  nova CLI commands and how they integrate with the Nova app.
- [Configuration](https://nova.pmqueiroz.dev/configuration/)
  Config file location, behavior, and full settings reference.
- [Development](https://nova.pmqueiroz.dev/development/)
  Building Nova, working on the codebase, and building the docs site.
- [Nova Documentation](https://nova.pmqueiroz.dev/)
  Deep-dive docs for Nova users and contributors.
- [Nova Docs](https://nova.pmqueiroz.dev/installation/)
- [OSC Integration](https://nova.pmqueiroz.dev/internals-osc/)
  Private OSC sequences used for CLI-to-app integration.
- [Keybindings](https://nova.pmqueiroz.dev/keybindings/)
  Keybinding syntax, defaults, and action reference.
- [Quickstart](https://nova.pmqueiroz.dev/quickstart/)
  First run, config location, and common workflows.
- [Troubleshooting](https://nova.pmqueiroz.dev/troubleshooting/)
  Common problems and fixes.
